name: ASUS PRIME Z790-P D4, Z790 LGA 1700 ATX motherboard supports PCIe® 5.0, 3 M.2 slots, 14(50A)+1(60A)+1 Power, DDR4, Realtek 2.5G wired LAN, HDMI®, DP, USB 3.2 Gen 2x2 Type-C®, Aura Sync
shortName: ASUS PRIME Z790-P D4, Z790 LGA 1700 ATX motherboard supports PCIe®
description: Mid-range ATX motherboard for Intel 12th/13th gen with PCIe 5.0, DDR4, and USB 3.2.
